keynotes.text: Kalieniczensko took live or six teaspoonfuls of an infusion of Phallus in twenty-four hours, and the symptoms of the Schema are the effects observed. There is a general resemblance to the effect of the Agarici─vertigo, disordered vision, gastro-enteric disturbance and viscid sweat.

generalities.text: Clinical: Gastro-enteralgia; Sweat, viscid; Vertigo; Vomiting
Dry, oppressive cough. Great feebleness of whole body.

eyes.text: Vision: difficult; obscured. Objects seem coloured grey, as in smoke.

mouth_throat.text: Profuse salivation. Great dryness of throat, with irritation as from black pepper.

stomach_abdomen.text: Loss of appetite. Devouring thirst. Violent vomitings with profuse salivation. Gastro-enteralgia. Painful sensitiveness of whole abdomen.

urinary.text: Urine deep red, depositing a sediment of urates of lime and soda.

fever_chill.text: After four days all the pores became opened, profuse viscid perspiration. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
